sophistication_level.description: Website sophistication level. basic/template = DIY or Wix/Squarespace. professional = clean agency site. custom = high-end custom build. stunning = best-in-class design.

team_size_estimate.description: Estimated team size. solo = 1 person. small = 2-5. medium = 6-15. large = 16+.

years_in_business.description: Estimated years in business based on website content (founded year, about page, etc). null if unknown.

google_ads.description: Evidence of Google Ads usage (ad links, UTM params, or mentions)

active_social.description: Active social media presence with 3+ posts/week on Instagram or Facebook

professional_photos.description: Non-stock professional photography of actual completed projects

video_content.description: YouTube channel, video testimonials, or embedded project videos

marketing_signals.description: Marketing sophistication signals detected from website content

reasoning.description: Brief explanation of the assessment (1-2 sentences).
